name: Boundless Vessel
description: Notes The Boundless Vessel is simply an upgraded version of the Resurrected Warrior’s Armor, improving it in the following ways: - Doubles the bonus MP and WIS. - Removes the cooldown for the Energized proc, increasing the maximum uptime for the buff from 50% to 100%. - Improves DEF by 3, bringing it to the 20 DEF standard seen on many other UT Heavy Armors. - Increases the XP Bonus by 1%.
effects: Soul Flare: On taking more than 40 damage gain Energized for 3 seconds
